summary: Completed testing of VSD (Virtual Share Distribution) Panel and Account Value Bug Fix. All backend APIs working correctly (8/8 tests passed). Frontend VSD dialog verified with all required elements visible.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1x-1) - minor rendering issue that doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Account Value Bug Fix correctly implemented - /api/profit/summary no longer returns licensee_funds field
VSD endpoint (/api/profit/vsd) correctly returns total_pool, master_admin_portion, licensee_funds, licensee_breakdown
VSD math is consistent: total_pool = master_admin_portion + licensee_funds
Frontend VSD dialog shows all required elements: Total Pool, Your Portion, Licensee Portions, pie chart, licensee table with columns (Name, Current Balance, Total Deposit, Total Profit, % Share)
context_for_next_testing_agent: VSD Panel and Account Value Bug Fix verified: 1) /api/profit/summary no longer returns licensee_funds - account_value is the raw Merin balance ($19,329.15); 2) /api/profit/vsd returns Virtual Share Distribution with total_pool, master_admin_portion, licensee_funds, licensee_breakdown; 3) VSD dialog accessible via 'Licensee VSD' button in Simulate Actions popup (Master Admin only); 4) Note: In test data, licensee_funds ($36,611.10) exceeds total_pool ($19,329.15) causing negative master_admin_portion - this is expected per test request notes.

account_value_bug_fix.details: /api/profit/summary no longer returns licensee_funds field. account_value ($19,329.15) is the raw Merin balance without additions.

vsd_endpoint.details: /api/profit/vsd returns correct structure: total_pool ($19,329.15), master_admin_portion ($-17,281.95), licensee_funds ($36,611.10), licensee_count (9), licensee_breakdown array with all required fields.

vsd_ui_button.details: 'Licensee VSD' button appears in Simulate Actions popup for Master Admin (data-testid='licensee-vsd-button').

vsd_ui_dialog.details: VSD dialog displays: Total Pool (Merin Balance), Your Portion, Licensee Portions, pie chart, and licensee table with columns (Name, Current Balance, Total Deposit, Total Profit, % Share).
